name: uploadStudyAssetsFile
description: Describe how to upload a file to the assets of a study via the JATOS HTTP API. This tool does not perform the upload itself. Instead, it explains how to construct a multipart/form-data POST request to the JATOS endpoint that accepts a file and uploads it.

studyIdOrUuid.description: Either a numeric study ID or a study UUID

filepath.description: Filepath to the file. Subdirectories are allowed and it can additionally rename the file. Non-existing subdirectories will be created. Existing files will be overwritten.

success.description: True if the upload instruction generation succeeded.

message.description: A message that describes the result of the operation.

curlCommand.description: A fully-formed curl command to upload the file to the study assets in JATOS. Copy and paste into a terminal.

importUrl.description: The URL to upload the file to the study assets on the JATOS server.
